name: Molasses Cookies with Citron
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until light.
2. Add molasses, sugar, corn syrup, water, and vinegar to the beaten eggs.
3. Sift 2 cups of flour into a bowl.
4. To 1 cup of sifted flour, add spices (cinnamon, baking soda, ground cloves), salt, and mix well.
5. Combine this mixture with the molasses mixture.
6. Add chopped citron and nuts that have been dredged in 1 cup of sifted flour.
7. Add enough flour to make a soft dough. Mix thoroughly.
8. Turn the dough onto a lightly floured board.
9. Roll out the dough into a thin sheet.
10. Cut with a floured cutter.
11. Place the cut cookies on a slightly oiled baking sheet.
12. Bake in a moderate oven (400°F) for about 10 minutes.
